pr-evidence/legacy-migration-scanner/pr-.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer found a same-version schema compatibility issue; the PR was updated so old v1 migration sidecars remain valid while scanner-generated evidence carries optional provenance. Re-review found no findings; GitHub rejected formal self-approval because owners cannot approve their own PR.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_legacy_compatibility.py tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q
what_changed: Added scan-config driven legacy migration evidence generation for downstream runner files.
Kept existing document_kv.legacy_compatibility_migration.v1 sidecars compatible while allowing optional scan provenance.
Documented the scan-config workflow for the eventual restaurant_kv_serving removal gate.
pr-evidence/legacy-migration-scanner/pr-.why: Removing the legacy restaurant compatibility facade needs evidence generated from actual release, benchmark, storage, native-probe, and smoke runner files rather than hand-authored assertions.
